description: You are a technical artist updating the introductory cinematic for 'Cosmic Vanguard'. Based on the engine specifications in /home/ga/Documents/engine_specs.txt, process the master video at /home/ga/Videos/mod_assets/intro_master_1080p.mp4 into a legacy AVI format with an 800x600 resolution and the first 5 seconds trimmed. Extract a loading screen snapshot and generate a JSON mod manifest. Save all deliverables to /home/ga/Videos/mod_build/.
